new_classes.label_en: Other Spirit in Containers of More Than 2 Litres (CN 22089077)
new_classes.label_de: Andere Spirituose in Behältnissen von mehr als 2 Litern (KN 22089077)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverages falling under the residual 'other' category of CN subheading 2208 90, presented in containers of more than 2 litres; classified under CN code 2208 90 77 (Chapter 22). For the detailed product scope see the explanatory note to subheading 2208 90 56.

coverage_explanation: The legal note for CN 22089077 is minimal, stating only "Other" and cross-referencing the explanatory note for subheading 22089056 (which is not reproduced here). The two distinguishing criteria that can be captured from the CN hierarchy are: (1) the product falls in the residual 'other spirit' category under 2208 90 (modelled via subClassOf eucn:OtherSpirit), and (2) the container volume is more than 2 litres (modelled via decimalRange minExclusive 2 on maxContainerVolumeL). The sibling code 22089056 covers the same product type in containers ≤ 2 L; the complement/disjointness with that class is implicitly captured via the volume restriction. Full coverage is not achievable because the substantive product-discriminating content is in the referenced note for 22089056, which was not provided.
